name: QA 1222
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1222

Exercise multiple DSO PMDAs using pmdaDynamic APIs.



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce

To reproduce this test, please run:
